name: Gene DiNovi
abstract: Eugene Salvatore "Gene" DiNovi (born May 26, 1928) is an American jazz pianist.

concerts.label: Frank Sinatra and Lena Horne, Singers
Frank Sinatra and Lena Horne, Singers

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: Gene DiNovi came into the band... And a few of us just went right over to Boyd Raeburn’s band in June of that year
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Red Norvo
about_quotes.evidence: that's the band that Benny Goodman would hire... we had Bill Harris and Flip Phillips, and maybe Gene DiNovi, and we worked here at Basin Street, East.
